name: Puffco New Peak
summary: A countertop electronic dab rig for patients prescribed cannabis concentrates and extracts.
description: The Puffco New Peak is an electronic dab rig that takes the torch and guesswork out of dabbing concentrates. A single button drives four temperature presets, the 3D chamber heats in around 20 seconds, and the glass attachment adds water filtration for a cooler draw. It suits patients who are prescribed extracts rather than dried flower and want consistent, repeatable dosing without a naked flame. It is a sizeable device for home use, not something to carry around — and at this price it only makes sense if concentrates are a regular part of your medicating.
